titleStmt.title: SII 20.252: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 252. (B.K. No. 121 of 1938-39.) KĀMADHĒNU, KALGHATGI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in front of the temple of Kallēśvara, outside the village.

summary.p: This inscription referring to the rule of Śivachitta-Permāḍi is dated in his 25th regnal year, Khara, Pushya śu. 14, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti. The given Pushya s11u. 14 fell on Monday but there was no Saṁkrānti on that day. Pushya ba. 14 also fell on Monday but the Saṁkrānti occurred on the previous day. Taking the latter to be the intended date, the details may be equated to A.D. 1171, December 27, Monday.
It records a grant of land to god Kalidēva of Sāsala in Palasige-nāḍu. A grant made by a certain Kumāra Mallayya for the worship and offerings to Toṟeyadēva, is also recorded.

The record states that Śivachitta-Permāḍi was governing Koṅkaṇa 900 and Palasige 12,000, from his capital at Chandrāpura. Eulogistic account of the exploits of Śivachitta's son Permāḍi and Vijayāditya is given. Kumāra Mallayya is described as the favourite disciple of Vijayāditya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ namaśśivāya . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhaṁ
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśva
raṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamāna haradha
raṇīprasūtaṁ trilōcanakadaṁbavaṁśamahōdaya mahīdharēṁdraśikharābhyudamānama
hāpracaṇḍamārttaṇḍakarātitībranijapratāpavaśīkṛtasakaḷamahīmaṁḍaḷanuttuṁgasiṁhalāṁ cchana vā
naramahādhvajaṁ permmāṭitūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ caturāśītinagarādhiṣṭitāṣṭādaśā śvamēdha
dīkṣādīkṣitakulaprasūtaṁ himavadgirīṁdraruṁdraśikharasaṁsthāpitamahāśaktiprabhāvaṁ tyāgaja
gajhaṁpajhaṁpaṇācāryya nissaṁkarāma śaraṇāgatavajraprākāraṁ lōkayka kaḷpadrumaṁ saṁkrāntidhavaḷaṁ mūrttinārā
yaṇaṁ kīrttimārttaṇḍaṁ maṇḍaḷikalalāṭapaṭṭa vairigharaṭṭa subhaṭarājaśikhāmaṇi kādaṁ bacūḍāmaṇītyakhiḷanāmāva
ḷīvirājitarappa śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ śrī śivacittavīrapermmāḍidēvaru koṁkeṇa voṁbhaynūṟumaṁ palasige pannircchā
siramumaṁ caṁdrāpuradoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire © Ā narapāḷana gramahiśīvare kuṁtaḷarāja pu
tri caṁdrānane yācakaprakarakalpalatōpameya(ṁ)drijātegaṁ jānakigaṁ samānaveni puṁnataśīlaviḷāsarūpaduddāni negartteyaṁ paḍedaḷurvvi
ge maiḷaladēvi permmeyiṁ Aṁtavargge tanayarādar ku(ṁ)ntaḷadēśādhināthadauhritya rbhbhūkāṁtēśarenisi bhujavikrāṁtaṁ permmāḍidēvavijayādi
tyaru © Avaroḷage © kaḍupiṁ permmāḍidēvaṁ nijavijayagajārūḍha(ṁ)vāgalke lāḷaṁ guḍugittā gaṁḍagarvvadraviṇanaḍagidaṁ māḷavaṁ bhītanādaṁ se
ḍadaṁ nēpāḷanaṇmaṁ toradu kaḷadanā gūrjjaraṁ pāriyātraṁ miḍukalu tānaṁji nindaṁ malepanaḷidaṁ māghadaṁ sēdegeṭṭaṁ © tada
nuja © Aribhūbhritupavidaṇḍanartthijanakalpōrvvījanatyaṁtavistarakīrtti pramadāmanō ramaḷanudyatubhūridhātrī
dhuraṁdharanatyūrjjitavaibhavaṁ vinutadhātrīpāḷacūḍāmaṇi sphuritāṁghridvayugajigīśu vijayādityāvanīpāḷa
ka © palasige pannircchāsiradoḷage karaṁ sogayisippa sāsaloḷaṁ tāṁ nelasiye niṁdaṁ karamesadiralke nijasvayaṁbhu
valli kalidēvēśa © Ā sāsala dakṣiṇabhāgadalli © paridaḷa paścimamukhadiṁ dhareyoḷure cōdyavenisidurvvānadiyaveṟa
ḍormme snānamāḍida phaladi śivalōkadalli sukhadiṁdirvvaru © Ā puṇyanadiya taḍiyoḷu lēsaha pūdōṭadiṁdavo
pputtirddaṁ śrī sōmanāthadēvaṁ sāsalapoladoḷage banu nelasiye nindaṁ © Ā dēvara dēgulavaṁ nūkaḍe pramukhavaṟuva
ttokkaluvaynūrvvaru samasta mummuridaṇḍaṁ māḍisida halakadharmmavanārayva purōhitaṁ cāvayyaṁ . pasidara mukha nōḍa pusi nu
ḍiyaṁ paravaniteyoldu baṁdaḍaṁ muṭṭaṁ śrī sōmanāthadēvara dāsa pulikarada su tvaraṁ cāvaṇna © Ā dēvarge ke
yyaṁ biṭṭa kumāra mallayyana pratāpaveṁteṁdaḍe © tuṟagamanēṟe khaḷgalate kaygaḷa vaṭṭire kumāra malla
yyaṁ muridaḍe māri mīṟidaḍe mrittu kaḍaṁgidaḍārdda bhairavaṁ keḷarddaḍe siṁhavurvvidaḍe hervvuli hāydaḍe kāḷaraThe correct phrase is munidaḍe māri.
kkasaṁ maraḷdaḍe moṟeya taḷare kurttuvanā raṇaraṅgadalli bhīkaramadavāraṇa jitaraṇa vijayārkkana gaṁdhavāraṇa .
vijayādityana rājyābhyudayakkaṁ tanadoṁdu sāhasakkaṁ tāṁ paḍedaṁ nijagaḷitanamaṁ dhareyoḷu raṇaraṅgabhairavaṁ ma
llayyaṁ Eḍaṟaṁ tōṟiye bēḍi baṁda manujarggārttīva saṁpattumaṁ naḍegeṭṭo kkaligaṁge dhānyacayamaṁ sadgēhamaṁ vaṁdigaḷgu
ḍugade nīḍuva hēmahastadodaviṁdāśādiśātaṁbaraṁ paḍadaṁ kumāra mallayyaṁ guṇayaśaśrīkīrttiyaṁ dhātriyoḷu ©
Ātana kulavadhu sakaḷōrvvītaḷadoḷu mailiyakka puṇyāratnaṁ lōkakutkṛṣṭavenalāke mahāguṇavinalli lakṣmiya pōltaḷu ©
svasti śrī kādaṁba śivacittavīrapermmāḍidēvavarṣada 25 khara saṁvatsarada puśya śudha 14 sōmavāradaṁduttarāyaṇa saṁ
krāṁti byatīpāta samanisida puṇyatithiyoḷu beḷguḍiya holada toṟeya teṁkaṇabhāgadalli mallayyaṁ toṟeyadēva
rge gandhadhūpadīpa naivēdya dēvaraṅgabhōgakke dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa hakkalva mattaloṁdu Ūroḷage śririvāgila baḍagaṇakēriya mū
pukaya maṭhavintī dharmma pratipāḷisidavā ru vāraṇasi kurukṣētravargghyatīrtthadalli sahasrakavile
rappa brāhmaṇarigubhayamukhiya koṭṭa phalavakuṁ I ṁtī dharmmavanaḷidavaru brāhmaṇaruvanā kavile
diṁ koṁda mahā pātakavaru . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundhara saṣṭirvvariśasahasrāṇi Iṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimi . ©
Digital edition of SII 20.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
